boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, AND credit/reversal status to distinguish from prior paid invoice. Current evidence shows INV-VAN-076 identical to PRIOR-VAN-076 on all four fields without credit/reversal status. Source boundary remains open.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinguishing credit/reversal status for duplicate-looking invoice; INV-VAN-076 lacks this required element per source boundary definition.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: MS-VAN-076 confirms M-4/R4 already paid by PRIOR-VAN-076. No credit/reversal status present. No vendor distinction clarification. No authoritative milestone register update distinguishing INV-VAN-076 as separate release. All three repair paths from gov baton remain unsatisfied.

critical_features_preserved: exact source doc_id values (INV-VAN-076, PRIOR-VAN-076, MS-VAN-076, STD-VAN-076-P)
action boundary scope (duplicate-looking milestone invoice release)
blocked moves registry from prior turns
final_answer: ESCALATE. FINAL_COMPILER confirms source boundary remains open. Invoice INV-VAN-076 is indistinguishable from PRIOR-VAN-076 on milestone ID (M-4), release number (R4), vendor (Vanta Field Services), and amount (USD 42,800). No credit/reversal status record is present in the source context. MS-VAN-076 confirms the milestone was already paid. The three repair paths specified by gov baton (credit/reversal status, vendor distinction clarification, authoritative milestone register update) remain unsatisfied. ALLOW is not supported by current source boundary. Execution blocked until authoritative distinguishing evidence is provided.
open_blockers: Credit/reversal status record remains MISSING from source boundary
Vendor distinction clarification remains UNRESOLVED per dependency ledger
No authoritative milestone register update distinguishing INV-VAN-076 from PRIOR-VAN-076 provided
ALLOW release blocked by unresolved dependency ledger
